I always though that (and I am just stating a fact as I understand it) if you crash in to someone in front of you that has braked sharply, it was your fault because you are supposed to leave enough room between vehicles for such an eventuality. She should not have behaved aggressively but then he should have left a safe distance. It is very sad. There are no winners here.

A grandmother who killed a beloved father by slamming down her brakes after she became angry on the motorway has been jailed for five years. Collette Gibson, 55, was driving along the A249 near Sittingbourne, Kent in April 2022 when she grew frustrated with a motorist driving 'close' behind her. Maidstone Crown Court heard Gibson, from South Ockenden in Essex, braked 'aggressively' - leading to a multi-vehicle collision. The BMW immediately behind her, driven by Robert Davis, 51, was forced to brake abruptly, causing motorcyclist Paul Wright, 51, to crash into it. Mr Wright, a father-of-three from East Malling in Kent, died from his injuries after he was thrown from his Harley-Davidson bike.

EXCLUSIVEDue to a nasty accident I was fitted with an Ilizarov frame 30 years ago as I had a section of bone in my lower leg that had died and had to be removed. I grew 10cm (4 inches) of new bone with the frame fitted. It was a painful 4 months but it saved my leg from being amputated. Once the frame was removed, there were more months of healing ahead. I was off work for 2 years in all. It is a very extreme thing to opt for such a surgical intervention to become taller.

This is the moment a stranded pet Labrador is rescued after she fell off a cliff and was left struggling in choppy waters below. The black Labrador, called Bailey, plunged 60ft off a coastal path into the sea in Ilfracombe, Devon, when she slipped her collar after being spooked by another dog. Her owner, Chris Carter, raised the alarm as Bailey climbed out of the water onto the rocks, but she was unable to move due to the waves. Coastguards first tried to reach her from the top, but the hazardous terrain made their initial approach impossible.

To be honest, I'd much prefer to be a traditional housewife. I'm nearly 50 and have been a full-time PA since leaving university, so 25 years of mundane, boring, tedious work. I've never enjoyed working and only do it because what option is there unless you marry a rich man? I enjoy cooking and keeping a clean, tidy house, and love welcoming my husband home from work every day, even if I've only just finished working myself. Unless you want a really exciting, inspiring, fulfilling career (which I never have) then what's wrong with 'keeping house'. The old fashioned husband/wife dynamics seem sensible to me and everyone's happy. Both people working leaves no free time to do nice things as you're having to do household work in the evenings and weekends.

Pedro Pascal and Jon Favreau could be forgiven for wishing they were in a galaxy far, far away on Wednesday after their new Star Wars spin-off was torn apart by unimpressed critics. The science-fiction adventure, directed by Favreau and starring Pascal as the enigmatic Din Djarin, is the latest big budget addition to the rapidly expanding franchise following its acquisition by The Walt Disney Company in 2012. Boris Johnson missed his chance when he was in power. HS2 should have been cancelled then. They had known for years that the costs were spiralling out of control. This project was set in motion in 2009 under the Labour government, when High Speed 2 Ltd was created as a government-funded body under the Department for Transport. From the outset, it looked like one of the biggest wastes of public money in modern British history. Back then, the estimated cost was around £15.8bn to £17.4bn. That money should have been invested in improving the existing rail network, fixing capacity problems, upgrading regional lines and delivering benefits people would actually use. Instead, we ended up with years of delays, ballooning costs and a project that became the biggest white elephant of our lifetime.

Mark Wild, who was parachuted in to rescue HS2 after doing the same for Crossrail, told MPs today that he was convinced it would not be delayed any further.
  • 118 comments
  • 1 video
  • share HS2 boss admits new £100bn cost is 'terrible news'

  • A relationship with a narcissist is a truly awful experience and always, always ends in tears. They come into your life like a whirlwind Love bomb you. Pretend to share the same interests. Profess their undying love for you. Marry me. I've never met anyone like you. You're my soulmate. Let's move in together. Let's have a baby. Let's plan out our first holiday together. Then slowly and insidiously, they chip away at your self-esteem. Start to criticise the way you look. The way you dress. Isolate you from your friends and family. And before you know it, you're walking on those proverbial 'egg shells', dreading what fault they'll find to criticise you with next. No one will ever understand what it's like unless they've lived it. I count myself in that.

What next, Joey Essex at the MoD? Department for Education's video showing Gemma Collins sashaying through their offices sends the internet into meltdown

Confusion has erupted online after the Department for Education teamed up with reality TV star Gemma Collins for a video that quickly sent the internet into meltdown.  The clip posted on Tuesday across the department's social channels was captured after the former The Only Way is Essex (TOWIE) star, 45, met Education Secretary Bridget Phillipson to discuss education reforms. The 18-second video shows Collins dressed in a rendition of a school uniform, with a tight-fitted corset overlaid on top of a lacy top - complete with a tie and leopard print umbrella.
  • 123 comments
  • 1 video
  • share Gemma Collins features in video for the Department of Education

In a more just world, the fact Gabbie is supposedly “influencing” 500k people on TikTok and 500k people on IG should also be a felony. After she is paroled from regular prison she should immediately serve a consecutive sentence in a social media prison reserved for the most dangerous IG and TikTok offenders.

Gabriela 'Gabbie' Lauren Gonzalez, 24, a TikTok star, was arrested on Friday in connection with an alleged scheme to kill Jack Avery, 26, the father of her seven-year-old daughter.

  • share Influencer conspired with dad to recruit hitman to have ex killed

It's not a lifeless body, it's a machine

A viral video has revealed the moment a robot suffered a hilarious mid-performance disaster while dancing to Billie Jean. The clumsy robot was performing in front of a watching audience and camera crew at an event put on by the Future Era robot store in Shenzhen, China. As the music played, the humanoid dancer began shuffling athletically across the stage before stumbling over a step. After fighting to regain its balance, the bot managed to force through a few more moves before crashing into the exact same spot. While the audience watched on in stunned silence, a human assistant emerged from the wings to sheepishly drag its lifeless body off stage.
  • 83 comments
  • 2 videos
  • share Robot collapses mid-performance before its body is dragged off stage
